title: agatea lecointei
intro: Agatea lecointei, also known as the Borneo coral tree or Borneo coral tree, is a flowering plant species native to Borneo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential antifungal and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agatea lecointei include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Agatea lecointei may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
